body_txt: When people make wagers, one possible penalty for losing is to eat a piece of your clothing. Hats are the most common form of clothing that can be eaten, especially in period pieces. However, sometimes they eat their pieces of clothing to show that they're frustrated. Please do not attempt to eat your clothes in real life, as you will choke or get food poisoning if you do swallow them. A Sub-Trope of Extreme Omnivore and Humiliating Wager . Compare Eating Shoes , normally done out of desperation, and Cue the Flying Pigs , which is something else that can happen when you tempt fate by declaring that something is impossible.
